proposed_value.name: Residential liquid fuel burning appliances — Part 2: Flued oil stoves with vaporizing burners
proposed_value.notes: Added by Implementing Decision (EU) 2026/284 (6 Feb 2026). Cited under CPR 305/2011 — DPP does NOT apply. Coexistence period ends 9 Feb 2027.

dataUpdates.reason: Implementing Decision (EU) 2026/284 adds EN 1-2:2025 to Annex I of 2019/451. New OJ-cited hEN for flued oil stoves. CPR 305/2011 citation — no DPP impact.

proposed_value.name: Residential solid fuel burning appliances — Part 2-5: Slow heat release appliances
proposed_value.notes: Added by Implementing Decision (EU) 2026/284 (6 Feb 2026). Cited under CPR 305/2011 — DPP does NOT apply. Coexistence period ends 9 Feb 2027.

dataUpdates.reason: 2026/284 adds EN 16510-2-5:2025 (slow heat release appliances) to OJ. New standard not previously in SHA standards list.

proposed_value.name: Residential solid fuel burning appliances — Part 2-10: Multi-firing sauna stoves
proposed_value.notes: Added by Implementing Decision (EU) 2026/284 (6 Feb 2026). Cited under CPR 305/2011 — DPP does NOT apply. Coexistence period ends 9 Feb 2027.

dataUpdates.reason: 2026/284 adds EN 16510-2-10:2025 (sauna stoves) to OJ. New standard not previously in SHA standards list.

proposed_value.notes: First cited by C(2024) 2697. Updated to EN 16510-2-7:2025 by Implementing Decision (EU) 2026/284 (6 Feb 2026). Coexistence period for 2025 revision ends 9 Feb 2027. Cited under CPR 305/2011 — DPP does NOT apply.

dataUpdates.reason: 2026/284 publishes the 2025 revision of EN 16510-2-7 (combination wood/pellet appliances). Standard was already cited — this updates the revision and adds the 2026/284 reference.
SHA gains 3 new hENs from 2026/284 (EN 1-2:2025, EN 16510-2-5:2025, EN 16510-2-10:2025). Total hEN count increases from 10 to 13.

dataUpdates.current_value: (not in list — FIX currently has 0 hENs, only EADs)

proposed_value.name: Permanent anchor devices and safety hooks
proposed_value.notes: Added by Implementing Decision (EU) 2026/284 (6 Feb 2026). First OJ-cited hEN for FIX family. Coexistence period ends 9 Aug 2027. Cited under CPR 305/2011 — DPP does NOT apply.

dataUpdates.reason: 2026/284 adds EN 17235:2024 (permanent anchor devices and safety hooks) to OJ. This is the first hEN for the FIX family, which previously had only EADs.
FIX gains its first hEN (EN 17235:2024) from 2026/284. hen_count changes from 0 to 1.
PCR SReq draft feedback deadline is 3 Mar 2026 (5 days away). Not yet adopted. ITB.pl also lists C(2025)2125 (10 Apr 2025) — may be predecessor. No field change yet.
DWS SReq draft notified 21 Jan 2026, feedback deadline 18 Feb 2026 (expired). Under CPR 2024/3110. Adoption could come Q1-Q2 2026. No change yet — monitor.

structuralIssues.title: Implementing Decision 2026/284 adds 5 new OJ-cited hENs
structuralIssues.description: Commission Implementing Decision (EU) 2026/284 (6 Feb 2026) amends 2019/451 with 5 new harmonised standards: 4 for space heating appliances (EN 16510 series + EN 1-2:2025) and 1 for fixings (EN 17235:2024). All cited under CPR 305/2011 — no DPP impact. FIX family gains its first hEN alongside existing EADs.
structuralIssues.action_required: Approve upd-001 through upd-007 to apply all 2026/284 changes. Also update SHA standards.summary to reflect new counts.

structuralIssues.title: DWS SReq feedback deadline expired — adoption may be imminent
structuralIssues.description: The draft SReq for doors, windows and related products (CPR 2024/3110) had a feedback deadline of 18 Feb 2026, which has now passed. Formal adoption could come Q1-Q2 2026. When adopted, DWS sreq field should change from 'Draft' to 'Adopted' and milestone date updated.
structuralIssues.action_required: Monitor EC Transparency Register for DWS SReq adoption. When adopted, update sreq to 'Adopted' and add adoption date.

structuralIssues.title: PCR has two SReq references — needs cross-referencing
structuralIssues.description: ITB.pl lists C(2025)2125 (10 Apr 2025) as SReq for precast concrete under CPR 305/2011. Meanwhile, the EC Notification System shows a new draft SReq notified 4 Feb 2026 with deadline 3 Mar 2026. These may be the same request (draft then adopted) or parallel requests.
structuralIssues.action_required: Cross-reference C(2025)2125 with the Feb 2026 draft SReq. If C(2025)2125 was already adopted, PCR sreq should be 'Adopted' not 'Draft'. Run /dive PCR for deep investigation.

structuralIssues.title: Horizontal dangerous substances SReq affects all 37 families
structuralIssues.description: A horizontal SReq for dangerous substance release assessment (Sep 2025 draft, CPR 2024/3110) will affect all 37 product families. Standards under CEN/TC 351. ESPR DPP registry (Art. 13) due 19 Jul 2026. JTC24 8 DPP framework standards targeting 31 Mar 2026. These cross-cutting developments are not reflected in individual family timelines.
structuralIssues.source: EC Notification System + CEN/CENELEC JTC24 + ESPR
structuralIssues.action_required: Consider adding a cross-family annotation about: (1) dangerous substances SReq impact, (2) ESPR registry timeline, (3) JTC24 DPP standards publication.
